app.title: Show HN: Turning a Gaussian Splat into a videogame
app.author: yak32
app.description: Converting a mathematical concept into a playable game.
proposed_tests: Create a new game project in PlayCanvas, add the Gaussian Splat feature
Verify that the feature works correctly in both 2D and 3D modes
Test the performance of the feature on a range of hardware configurations
Compare the results of using Gaussian Splat vs a traditional game physics engine
